policy: Stage-local acceptance proves the current stage only; final AC-* links remain mandatory at their owning implementation stages and at final review.

acceptance_contracts.title: 版本化任务包导入
acceptance_contracts.environment: local development worktree with no remote write
acceptance_contracts.input: v1.0.0 source provenance and authorized v1.0.1 repair set
acceptance_contracts.oracle: v1.0.1 manifest is complete and read-only validation leaves the tree byte-identical; v1.0.0 provenance remains traceable without publishing withheld sensitive source.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: manifest mismatch 0; validator-created or modified files 0; remote writes 0
acceptance_contracts.pass_gate: S0AC-001 evidence valid and threshold satisfied
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Stop Stage 0 and restore the last verified local commit.

acceptance_contracts.title: 冻结不变量与可实现协议
acceptance_contracts.input: canonical facts, platform capability evidence and timeline protocol
acceptance_contracts.oracle: All frozen product boundaries are unchanged; schedule, single repository, exact message trash and timeline cardinality have executable checks; unsupported atomic replacement is absent.
acceptance_contracts.pass_gate: S0AC-002 evidence valid and threshold satisfied
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Keep every production flag disabled and repair the contract.

acceptance_contracts.title: 合成与公开脱敏基线
acceptance_contracts.input: synthetic public evidence fixture and current public tree
acceptance_contracts.oracle: The synthetic fixture satisfies the public schema and the publishable tree contains no live secret, private repository locator or real message field.
acceptance_contracts.pass_gate: S0AC-003 evidence valid and threshold satisfied
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Block publication and remove the sensitive value without rewriting evidence.

acceptance_contracts.title: 收益成本与停止标准冻结
acceptance_contracts.input: metrics, cost-benefit document and kill criteria
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Every metric and kill criterion has an identifier, measurable condition and explicit action; no production claim is inferred from a planned baseline.
acceptance_contracts.pass_gate: S0AC-004 evidence valid and threshold satisfied
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Keep Stage 0 open until measurable stop rules exist.

acceptance_contracts.title: 外部共享 Governance 绑定
acceptance_contracts.input: governance binding and project-specific fact adapter
acceptance_contracts.oracle: The exact pinned shared tools are consumed from an external checkout; no shared framework file is copied, forked or reconstructed in this project.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: pinned tool hash mismatch 0; copied shared tools 0
acceptance_contracts.pass_gate: S0AC-005 evidence valid and threshold satisfied
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Reject the governance integration and restore external-only consumption.

acceptance_contracts.title: 双平面七文件确定性一致
acceptance_contracts.environment: pinned external Governance checkout and temporary render directory
acceptance_contracts.input: canonical machine facts, derived Governance facts and seven committed documents
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Regenerating through the pinned shared renderer produces byte-identical seven files and the shared document-budget and blocker gates pass.
acceptance_contracts.pass_gate: S0AC-006 evidence valid and threshold satisfied
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Regenerate from machine facts; never hand-edit the seven files.

acceptance_contracts.title: 一次性部署动作清单完整
acceptance_contracts.input: one-time setup checklist and non-goal guard
acceptance_contracts.oracle: OAuth, GitHub App, protected secrets, recovery delivery and repository settings are explicit while no external setup action has run.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: required setup domains 5/5; secrets read 0; deployment actions 0
acceptance_contracts.pass_gate: S0AC-007 evidence valid and threshold satisfied
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Do not begin protected deployment work.
